headline: These 3 Stocks Were the Worst Performers on the Nasdaq-100 in the First Half of 2026. Can They Rebound in the Second Half?

headline: Here Is Why Workday (WDAY) Is An Attractive AI Stock to Invest In
summary: Workday Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of BlackRock’s 30 most important AI stocks right now. BlackRock is the largest institutional holder in the company, owning approximately 20.08 million shares, or slightly over 12.8% of the outstanding shares, as of March 31, 2026, per the filings.
